title: Renewal of Accreditation. The accreditation may be renewed at the
content: 20 request of the principal/employer or licensed manning agency, within sixty (60) calendar 21 days prior to its expiration, and upon submission of the following: 22 23 1. Letter request from the LMA; 24 25 2. Renewed or updated MA and SPA or confirmation from the principal/employer 26 that the agreement is still valid; 27 28 3. Valid business license or confirmation from the principal/employer that its 29 business license is still valid as acknowledged by the LMA; 30 31 4. List of active ships; 32 33 5. Updated salary scale or confirmation from principal/employer that the current 34 salary scale shall be retained; and 35 36 6. List of inactive ships using the prescribed form. 37 38 These requirements are without prejudice to other requirements that may be provided by 39 applicable laws, rules and regulations. 40 41 Non-renewal of the accreditation after a period of one (1) year from expiration shall cause 42 delisting from the roster of accredited principals/employers. 43 44
